svg.text: Managed File Transfer on Boomi — integrated with the Integration & API-management platform (estate logical view)
EXTERNAL ESTATE — cross-government, digital & SaaS (native iPaaS)
iPaaS Platform · Boomi (control plane / external-facing runtime)
Landing zones · tracking · audit · delivery confirmation
INTERNAL ESTATE — hosted · trusted zone · HA
Boomi Internal Runtime (deployed per host — e.g. AWS · Azure)
Applied by config: PGP decrypt/encrypt · TAR (de)archive · validate · rename · route · post-action
e.g. CyberArk PAM / Azure Key Vault —
no native path to source MFT
